destinations.name: Almaty
destinations.subtitle: Where city charm meets mountain grandeur
destinations.description: Almaty, Kazakhstan's cultural capital, blends glamorous cityscapes with the breathtaking Tian Shan Mountains. Experience snow-capped peaks, crystal-clear Issyk-Kul Lake, dramatic canyons, and vibrant bazaars. A hidden gem for adventurous travellers seeking something truly unique.

destinations.name: Bali
destinations.subtitle: The Island of the Gods — romance, culture and tropical bliss
destinations.description: Bali, the Island of the Gods, beckons with its lush rice terraces, ancient temples, vibrant arts scene, and world-class surfing. Whether you seek a romantic getaway, a cultural retreat, or an adventure-packed holiday — Bali delivers an unforgettable experience at every turn.

destinations.name: Dubai
destinations.subtitle: Where luxury meets the desert — the city of gold
destinations.description: Dubai is a city of superlatives — the world's tallest building, the largest mall, and the most luxurious hotels. From thrilling desert dune bashing to dazzling dinner cruises on the Dubai Marina, from the gold souk to Abu Dhabi's grand mosque — Dubai is an extraordinary experience.

destinations.name: Northern Lights
destinations.subtitle: Chase the Aurora Borealis across Scandinavia
destinations.description: Witness nature's most spectacular light show — the Aurora Borealis — dancing across Arctic skies in Finland, Norway, and Iceland. From cosy glass igloos to icebreaker cruises, dog sledding to whale watching, these Scandinavian adventures promise memories that last a lifetime.

destinations.name: Hong Kong
destinations.subtitle: Where East meets West in a dazzling skyline
destinations.description: Hong Kong is a captivating fusion of East and West — a vertical city of gleaming skyscrapers, harbour cruises, temple markets, and Michelin-starred restaurants. From The Peak's panoramic views to the bustling streets of Mong Kok and the glamour of Macau, Hong Kong is an endlessly fascinating destination.

packages.name: Hong Kong Highlights | Harbour Cruise & Peak Views
Hong Kong Grand Luxe Tour | 5 Nights City Escape

destinations.name: Japan
destinations.subtitle: From cherry blossoms to neon city lights
destinations.description: Japan is a mesmerising blend of ancient traditions and futuristic innovation. Walk through serene Kyoto temples, witness the iconic Mount Fuji, explore the neon streets of Tokyo, and savour world-class Japanese cuisine. A destination like no other, Japan promises an unforgettable sensory journey.

packages.name: Japan Illuminated | From Tokyo Skylines to Osaka Streets

destinations.name: Malaysia
destinations.subtitle: Truly Asia — where culture, nature and modernity unite
destinations.description: Malaysia is a vibrant tapestry of cultures, cuisines, and landscapes. From the iconic Petronas Twin Towers to pristine Langkawi beaches, colonial Penang streets to dense Borneo rainforests — Malaysia captivates every type of traveller with its incredible diversity and warm hospitality.

destinations.name: Singapore
destinations.subtitle: The Lion City — where futuristic skylines meet tropical gardens
destinations.description: Singapore is a dazzling city-state that effortlessly blends ultramodern architecture with rich cultural heritage. From the iconic Marina Bay Sands and Gardens by the Bay to Sentosa's beach resorts and Universal Studios — Singapore offers world-class experiences in a compact, vibrant destination.

destinations.name: Greece
destinations.subtitle: Ancient mythology, azure waters, and breathtaking sunsets
destinations.description: Greece enchants with its iconic white-washed villages, sapphire Aegean waters, ancient ruins, and legendary sunsets. From the romance of Santorini to the party vibes of Mykonos and the ancient glory of Athens — Greece is the ultimate Mediterranean escape for every type of traveller.

destinations.name: Paris
destinations.subtitle: Paris · Switzerland · Italy · Amsterdam — the best of Europe
destinations.description: Europe is a treasure trove of iconic cities, alpine landscapes, and cultural wonders. From the romantic boulevards of Paris to the snow-capped Swiss Alps, the canals of Amsterdam to the ancient ruins of Rome — our Europe packages let you experience the very best of this magnificent continent.

destinations.name: Switzerland
destinations.subtitle: Alpine peaks, pristine lakes and fairytale landscapes
destinations.description: Switzerland is the quintessential Alpine paradise — a land of majestic snow-capped peaks, crystalline lakes, charming medieval towns, and world-renowned chocolate and watches. From the thrilling Jungfraujoch peak to the serene shores of Lake Geneva and the vibrant streets of Zurich, Switzerland is eternally beautiful.

destinations.name: Russia
destinations.subtitle: Imperial grandeur, onion domes and vast landscapes
destinations.description: Russia is a land of extraordinary contrasts — from the golden spires of Moscow's Kremlin to the elegant canals of St. Petersburg, from the vast Siberian tundra to the stunning shores of Lake Baikal. Rich in history, culture, art, and architecture, Russia offers a travel experience unlike any other.

destinations.name: Mauritius
destinations.subtitle: A tropical paradise of turquoise lagoons and lush valleys
destinations.description: Mauritius is the definition of paradise — a jewel of the Indian Ocean blessed with crystal-clear lagoons, pristine white beaches, lush green valleys, and world-class resorts. Whether you seek romance, adventure, or pure relaxation, this island paradise delivers an unforgettable experience.

packages.name: Love in Paradise | Mauritius Honeymoon Journey
Tropical Honeymoon | Mauritius Bliss
Mauritius Magic | Romantic Shores & Valleys

destinations.name: Thailand
destinations.subtitle: Land of Smiles — temples, beaches and tropical adventures
destinations.description: Thailand is Southeast Asia's most beloved destination — a captivating blend of ornate temples, tropical islands, vibrant street markets, and warm hospitality. From Bangkok's electrifying energy to Phuket's azure waters and Krabi's dramatic limestone cliffs, Thailand enchants every traveller.

destinations.name: Turkey
destinations.subtitle: Where ancient heritage meets turquoise shores
destinations.description: Turkey is a magnificent bridge between Europe and Asia — a land of fairy-tale Cappadocia valleys, ornate Ottoman palaces, turquoise Mediterranean bays, and vibrant bazaars. From hot-air balloon rides over volcanic landscapes to sailing the Bodrum coast, Turkey is an extraordinary destination.

destinations.name: Vietnam
destinations.subtitle: Ancient temples, emerald bays and golden coastlines
destinations.description: Vietnam is a land of extraordinary beauty — from the misty mountains of the north to the golden sands of the south. Cruise through the legendary Halong Bay, explore ancient Hoi An lantern-lit streets, discover Cu Chi tunnels history, and savour the world's finest street food. Vietnam captivates every traveller.
